subcodes.first_line: O resplendent gem and luminous pearl, may God increase thy radiance and brilliance, for the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الفریده الغراء و الخریده النوراء زادک الله تشعشعا و التماعا ان الملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @entry by troops
